# ExtensibleSingleSignOn.PlatformSSO

**Device Management Profile**

The dictionary to configure Platform SSO. Requires `Type` to be set to `Redirect`.

## Declaration

```swift
object ExtensibleSingleSignOn.PlatformSSO
```

## Objects

- **ExtensibleSingleSignOn.PlatformSSO.AuthorizationGroups**: The pairing of Authorization Rights to group names.
- **ExtensibleSingleSignOn.PlatformSSO.TokenToUserMapping**: The attribute mapping to use when creating users, or for authorization.

## Objects

- **ExtensibleSingleSignOn.ExtensionData**: The additional data to pass to the app extension.

items.description: The pairing of Authorization Rights to group names.
